Name: Yogurt
description: Fresh, creamy yogurt made from premium-quality milk. Rich in protein and calcium, it's perfect for a healthy breakfast, snacks, smoothies, or everyday meals.

Name: Cheese
description: Fresh, rich, and naturally flavorful cheese made from premium-quality milk. Perfect for sandwiches, pizzas, burgers, pasta, salads, or enjoying on its own. A delicious source of calcium and protein for every meal.

Name: Butter Milk
description: Enjoy the refreshing taste of our fresh buttermilk, made from high-quality yogurt using traditional methods. Naturally cooling, light, and rich in probiotics, it's the perfect drink to complement your meals or keep you refreshed on a hot day. Served fresh with a smooth, delicious taste.
